title: Pan-Seared Mackerel with Soy Glaze
description: A simple yet flavorful Chinese dish featuring pan-seared mackerel glazed with a sweet and savory soy sauce mixture.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil or parchment paper.
Season the mackerel fillets with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add the cooking oil.
Sear the mackerel fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Transfer the mackerel to the prepared baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, whisk together the soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and grated ginger in a small bowl.
Bring the soy glaze to a simmer in the skillet over medium heat and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened.
Remove the mackerel from the oven and brush with the soy glaze.
Top with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
